brain.commentary: Mixed tape: index longs (SPY, QQQ, DIA) and modest AAPL/GOOGL strength support constructive equity exposure, but breadth is poor — most single names (MSFT, META, TSLA, AMZN, NVDA) show negative alpha and are correctly flat. Crypto complex is uniformly weak with deeply negative alpha and elevated vol; keep it flat and shade convictions down. Alt-data is unavailable across the board, so all signals rest on price-based factors alone — treat convictions as slightly fragile, especially QQQ's long which carries near-zero alpha (momentum-only) and NVDA/TSLA where beta >1.9 makes any re-entry risky. O
